_notes.purpose: Example batch_brute.json. Batch mode runs brute force for every image x prompt combination.
_notes.brute_config: Path to brute.json. Controls trials, threshold, seed behavior, save_unsuccessful, and perturbation ranges.
_notes.pipeline_config: Optional override. If omitted, batch mode uses pipeline_config from brute.json.
_notes.image_extensions: Allowed file extensions. Defaults to png/jpg/jpeg/webp when omitted.
_notes.recursive: false scans only images directly in images_dir. true includes subfolders.
_notes.prompts: Each prompt is paired with each image.
_notes.output_dir: Batch output folder. Contains batch_report.json and one folder per image/prompt combo.
_notes.skip_existing: true skips a combo if its brute_report.json already exists.
_notes.parallel_combinations: Number of image/prompt combos to run at the same time. Values above 1 may cause CUDA memory issues because each combo may use diffusion on the GPU.

prompts: make the person look like a studio portrait
